# render-diff

Diff renderer for the routes facet in the PR review pane. Contributes a
`DiffRenderer` that projects each plugin's routes (every HTTP/WS route string,
ordered serverâ†’central then httpâ†’ws, via `routesToComparable` in the facet
`core/`) so the host can diff a plugin's routes between the worktree and main.
The `endpointCallers` reverse index is excluded â€” it is derived from other
plugins' route usage, not authored here.
